CHAMP-ADRENAL_ARMOR.title: Adrenal Armor
CHAMP-ALL_OUT.title: All Out
CHAMP-ARENA_MASTERY.title: Arena Mastery
CHAMP-ARENA_MASTERY.description:
[gold]Berserker Finishers[/gold] grant {ArenaMasteryBerserkerPower:diff()} more [gold]Strength[/gold].
[gold]Defensive Finishers[/gold] grant {ArenaMasteryDefensivePower:diff()} more [gold]Block[/gold].
CHAMP-ARENA_PREPARATION.title: Arena Preparation
CHAMP-BACKSTEP.title: Backstep
CHAMP-BATTLE_PLAN.title: Battle Plan
CHAMP-BERSERKERS_SHOUT.title: Berserker's Shout
CHAMP-BOB_AND_WEAVE.title: Bob and Weave
CHAMP-BRING_IT_ON.title: Bring It On
CHAMP-CHAIN_LASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This turn, your [gold]Skill Bonus[/gold] effects are increased by {ChainLashPower:diff()}.
CHAMP-CHAIN_LASH.title: Chain Lash
CHAMP-CHALLENGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the target has [gold]Strength[/gold], repeat these effects once.
CHAMP-CHALLENGE.title: Challenge
CHAMP-CHAMP_CARD_MODEL.title: Champ Card Model
CHAMP-CHEAP_SHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is a Boss, deal damage two more times. If not, [gold]Stun[/gold] it.
CHAMP-CHEAP_SHOT.title: Cheap Shot
CHAMP-CIRCUMVENT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
If not in [gold]Defensive[/gold], Discard {Cards:diff()} cards.
CHAMP-CIRCUMVENT.title: Circumvent
CHAMP-CLOBBER_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
CHAMP-CLOBBER_STRIKE.title: Clobber Strike
CHAMP-CROOKED_STRIKE.title: Crooked Strike
CHAMP-CROWNARANG.title: Crownarang
CHAMP-DANCING_MASTER.description: The first time you use a [gold]Finisher[/gold] each turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw a card.
CHAMP-DANCING_MASTER.title: Dancing Master
CHAMP-DEATH_BLOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
CHAMP-DEATH_BLOW.title: Death Blow
CHAMP-DEFEND_CHAMP.title: Defend
CHAMP-DEFENSIVE_SHOUT.title: Defensive Shout
CHAMP-DEFIANCE.title: Defiance
CHAMP-DEVASTATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
Costs 1 less {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each [gold]Finisher[/gold] played this combat.
CHAMP-DEVASTATE.title: Devastate
CHAMP-DOUBLE_STYLE.title: Double Style
CHAMP-EMERGENCY_PIVOT.title: Emergency Pivot
CHAMP-ENCHANT_CROWN.description:
Choose a card in [gold]Hand[/gold].
It gains [purple]Crowned[/purple].
CHAMP-ENCHANT_CROWN.title: Enchant Crown
CHAMP-ENCHANT_SHIELD.description:
Choose a Skill in [gold]Hand[/gold].
It gains [purple]Sturdy[/purple].
CHAMP-ENCHANT_SHIELD.title: Enchant Shield
CHAMP-ENCHANT_SWORD.description:
Choose a Attack in [gold]Hand[/gold].
It gains [purple]Instinct[/purple].
CHAMP-ENCHANT_SWORD.title: Enchant Sword
CHAMP-ENCIRCLE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {GloryPower:diff()} [gold]Glory[/gold] for each enemy hit.
CHAMP-ENCIRCLE.title: Encircle
CHAMP-ENDURE.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} Block, 
increased by [gold]Strength[/gold] instead of [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
Enter [gold]Defensive[/gold].
CHAMP-ENDURE.title: Endure
CHAMP-ENRAGED_BASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage{Repeat:plural:| {Repeat:diff()} times}.
[gold]Berserker Combo[/gold]:
This card hits an additional time this combat.
CHAMP-ENRAGED_BASH.title: Enraged Bash
CHAMP-EN_GARDE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If your [gold]Block[/gold] is broken this turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] next turn.
CHAMP-EN_GARDE.title: En Garde
CHAMP-EXECUTE.title: Execute
CHAMP-EXECUTION.title: Execution
CHAMP-EXECUTION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times.
Perform twice without exiting your [gold]Stance[/gold]:
CHAMP-FACE_SLAP.title: Face Slap
CHAMP-FANCY_FOOTWORK.description:
Enter a [gold]Stance[/gold] you aren't in.
The next [gold]Finisher[/gold] this turn deals[gold] [/gold]{FancyFootworkPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
CHAMP-FANCY_FOOTWORK.title: Fancy Footwork
CHAMP-FAN_OF_KNIVES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Berserker Combo[/gold]:
Deals damage twice.
CHAMP-FAN_OF_KNIVES.title: Fan of Blades
CHAMP-FLASH_STRIKE.title: Flash Strike
CHAMP-FLURRY_OF_STRIKES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you enter a [gold]Stance[/gold], return this to your [gold]Hand[/gold] from the [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
CHAMP-FLURRY_OF_STRIKES.title: Flurry Of Strikes
CHAMP-GLADIATOR_FORM.description: The first Attack you play each turn deals double damage.
CHAMP-GLADIATOR_FORM.title: Gladiator Form
CHAMP-GOOD_CLEAN_FIGHT.title: Good Clean Fight
CHAMP-GUTS_AND_GLORY.title: Guts and Glory
CHAMP-GUT_PUNCH.title: Gut Punch
CHAMP-HEADBUTT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
CHAMP-HEADBUTT.title: Headbutt
CHAMP-HOLD_FIRM.title: Hold Firm
CHAMP-HONE_BLADE.title: Hone Blade
CHAMP-HUDDLE.title: Huddle
CHAMP-IGNORE_PAIN.description: Your HP cannot be reduced until your next turn.
CHAMP-IGNORE_PAIN.title: Ignore Pain
CHAMP-IMPROVISING.description: Whenever you enter a [gold]Stance[/gold], trigger its [gold]Skill Bonus [/gold]{ImprovisingPower:diff()} times.
CHAMP-IMPROVISING.title: Improvising
CHAMP-INSPIRATION.title: Inspiration
CHAMP-IRON_FORTRESS.description:
Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
At the end of each turn, gain {MetallicizePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
CHAMP-IRON_FORTRESS.title: Iron Fortress
CHAMP-KILLING_SPREE.title: Killing Spree
CHAMP-KILLING_SPREE.description:
[gold]Stances[/gold] no longer have a cap on [gold]Skill Bonuses[/gold].
Trigger your current [gold]Stance[/gold]'s [gold]Skill Bonus[/gold] {Skill:diff()} times.
CHAMP-LARIAT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] X times.
Trigger your Stance's [gold]Skill Bonus[/gold] X times.
CHAMP-LARIAT.title: Lariat
CHAMP-LAST_STAND.title: Last Stand
CHAMP-MAGNIFICENCE.title: Magnificence
CHAMP-MAGNIFICENCE.description: At the start of your turn, gain {MagnificencePower:diff()} [gold]Glory[/gold].
CHAMP-MASTERFUL_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
At the start of your next turn, gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
CHAMP-MASTERFUL_SLASH.title: Masterful Slash
CHAMP-MOMENT_OF_TRUTH.title: Moment of Truth
CHAMP-MURDER_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
When you use a Skill, this deals {Increase:diff()} more damage this combat.
CHAMP-MURDER_STRIKE.title: Murder Strike
CHAMP-PARRY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {CounterPower:diff()} [gold]Counter[/gold].
If [gold]Counter[/gold] is used this turn, gain another [gold]Riposte Strike[/gold].
CHAMP-PARRY.title: Parrying Shield
CHAMP-PERFECTER_STRIKE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for ALL your "Strike" cards.
CHAMP-PERFECTER_STRIKE.title: Perfecter Strike
CHAMP-PILEDRIVER.title: Piledriver
CHAMP-PRECISE_THRUST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Berserker Combo[/gold]: 
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Defensive Combo[/gold]: 
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
CHAMP-PRECISE_THRUST.title: Precise Thrust
CHAMP-PREEMPTIVE_STRIKE.title: Preemptive Strike
CHAMP-PROTECTIVE_AURA.title: Protective Aura
CHAMP-PROTECTIVE_AURA.description: Whenever you end your turn while in no [gold]Stance[/gold], gain {ProtectiveAuraPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
CHAMP-RAPID_STRIKES.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
A random "Strike" card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] costs 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
CHAMP-RAPID_STRIKES.title: Rapid Strikes
CHAMP-RECKLESS_STRIKE.title: Reckless Strike
CHAMP-REFRESHMENT.description:
[gold]Berserker Combo[/gold]:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, then [gold]Exhaust[/gold] this.
[gold]Defensive Combo[/gold]:[gold]
[/gold]Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
CHAMP-REFRESHMENT.title: Refreshment
CHAMP-RIPOSTE_STRIKE.title: Riposte Strike
CHAMP-RISING_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the last card played was a [gold]Finisher[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage again.
CHAMP-RISING_STRIKE.title: Rising Strike
CHAMP-ROPE_A_DOPE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} cards.
CHAMP-ROPE_A_DOPE.title: Rope-a-dope
CHAMP-SET_A_TRAP.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Defensive Combo[/gold]:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
CHAMP-SET_A_TRAP.title: Set A Trap
CHAMP-SHATTER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Any [gold]Stance Combo[/gold]:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
CHAMP-SHATTER.title: Shatter
CHAMP-SHIELD_THROW.title: Shield Throw
CHAMP-SHOW_OFF.title: Show-off
CHAMP-SHOW_OFF.description:
Trigger your current [gold]Stance[/gold]'s [gold]Skill Bonus[/gold].
Choose another player to draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
CHAMP-SIGIL_OF_VICTORY.title: Sigil of Victory
CHAMP-SKILLFUL_DODGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {CounterPower:diff()} [gold]Counter[/gold].
[gold]Defensive Combo[/gold]:
Increase these effects by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
CHAMP-SKILLFUL_DODGE.title: Skillful Dodge
CHAMP-STANCE_DANCE.description:
Choose a [gold]Stance[/gold] to Enter.
Trigger its [gold]Skill Bonus[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: twice|}.
CHAMP-STANCE_DANCE.title: Stance Dance
CHAMP-STANCE_DANCE_BERSERKER.title: Berserker
CHAMP-STANCE_DANCE_DEFENSIVE.title: Defensive
CHAMP-STEEL_EDGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X times.
Perform X times, at least once:
CHAMP-STEEL_EDGE.title: Steel Edge
CHAMP-STRIKE_CHAMP.title: Strike
CHAMP-STRIKE_OF_GENIUS.description:
At the start of your turn, gain a random {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded[/gold] |}"Strike" [gold]Echo[/gold].
It costs 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} until played.
CHAMP-STRIKE_OF_GENIUS.title: Strike of Genius
CHAMP-SWORD_THROW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times.
If not in [gold]Berserker[/gold], you can't play Attacks next turn.
CHAMP-SWORD_THROW.title: Sword Throw
CHAMP-TAUNT.title: Taunt
CHAMP-TECHNICAL_JIG.title: Technical Jig
CHAMP-TORNADO_PUNCH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Defensive Combo[/gold]:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each enemy hit.
CHAMP-TORNADO_PUNCH.title: Tornado Punch
CHAMP-TRIPLE_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strike{IfUpgraded:show:+|} Echoes[/gold]. 
They cost 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and trigger [gold]Skill Bonus[/gold].
CHAMP-TRIPLE_STRIKE.title: Triple Strike
CHAMP-ULTIMATE_STANCE.title: Ultimate Stance
CHAMP-VICIOUS_MOCKERY.description:
Gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Trigger your current Stance's [gold]Skill Bonus[/gold].
CHAMP-VICIOUS_MOCKERY.title: Vicious Mockery
CHAMP-VICTORY_IS_MINE.title: Victory is Mine!
CHAMP-WIND_UP.description:
Choose a [gold]Stance[/gold] to Enter.
Select a [gold]Finisher[/gold] from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to add to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
CHAMP-WIND_UP.title: Wind Up
CHAMP-WINNERS_CIRCLE.title: Winner's Circle
CHAMP-WREATH_OF_VICTORY.title: Wreath of Victory
